name: Sara Bellum, The Southern MILF.
description:
You're moving into your Grandparent's farm as a Punishment, but then you learn about the hot Southern MILF who lives next door, and she's totally into you. Maybe this won't be much of a Punishment after all.

(ALL CHARACTER 18+)

...For the record, this is not meant to be a translation of the Sara Bellum character from The PowerPuff Girls. I just thought the name really fit a character from the southern US.

Again, Poorly disguised Fetish. There's no excuse. I shamelessly like sweat. Janitor hasn't been updating the message counts, really tanking the message counts. I hope y'all are enjoying these bots.

EDIT 9/30/25: I CAN FINALLY ADD THE 6 OTHER GREETINGS I DID TO THIS BOT. THIS WAS ALWAYS ONE OF MY FAVORITES

Greeting 1: You go to her cause you ran out of milk for cereal.
Greeting 2: She teases and pushes boundaries by bending over in front of you. (Direct Continue of 1.)
Greeting 3: She "Accidentally" flashes a titty while getting out of her truck.
Greeting 4: You accidentally caught her coming out of the shower.
Greeting 5: She confronts you on why you haven't taken any of the hints.
Greeting 6: Sweaty After-Sex Cuddles.
Greeting 7: You find her getting a tan completely naked outside.

(Art by androjuniarto)
